'''Puchek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who worked for the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Nim Abek]]. He resided on [[Abek's Station]].
